---
title: "main"
author: "Caroline Lebrun-Sabalot, Pierre Ripoll, Matéo Garbe"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    theme: cosmo
execute: 
    echo: false
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
#| output: false
import os 
import pandas as pd
from functions.basic_functions import load_gpkg
from functions.s3_connexion import get_s3
import functions.RDD_functions
import importlib
importlib.reload(functions.RDD_functions)
from functions.RDD_functions import plot_rdd 
```

# Balanced Checks 

```{python}
#| output: false

#vote
remote_path="RDD/df_RDD_main_BC_full.csv"
local_path = f"/tmp/{os.path.basename(remote_path)}"
get_s3().download_file("mgarbe", remote_path, local_path)
gdf_RDD=pd.read_csv(local_path, sep=";")

```

```{python}
#| output: false
seuil=8
gdf_RDD_seuil=gdf_RDD[abs(gdf_RDD["delta_score_1"])<seuil].copy()
print(f"Variables dispo pour BC : {[col for col in gdf_RDD_seuil.columns if col.startswith("BC_")]}")

```

::: {.panel-tabset}


## Population

::: {.columns}

### 2014

```{python}
plot_rdd(gdf_RDD_seuil, outcome_var='BC_pop',e='2014_muni')
```

### 2020

```{python}
plot_rdd(gdf_RDD_seuil, outcome_var='BC_pop',e='2020_muni')
```

:::

## Densité de population

::: {.columns}

### 2014

```{python}
plot_rdd(gdf_RDD_seuil, outcome_var='BC_dens_pop',e='2014_muni')
```

### 2020

```{python}
plot_rdd(gdf_RDD_seuil, outcome_var='BC_dens_pop',e='2020_muni')
```

:::

## Chômage

::: {.columns}

### 2014

```{python}
plot_rdd(gdf_RDD_seuil, outcome_var='BC_taux_chom',e='2014_muni')
```

### 2020

```{python}
plot_rdd(gdf_RDD_seuil, outcome_var='BC_taux_chom',e='2020_muni')
```

:::

## Emploi

::: {.columns}

### 2014

```{python}
plot_rdd(gdf_RDD_seuil, outcome_var='BC_taux_emploi',e='2014_muni')
```

### 2020

```{python}
plot_rdd(gdf_RDD_seuil, outcome_var='BC_taux_emploi',e='2020_muni')
```

:::
:::
